no: Akun's Gear !_-AkunsGear-Main;Akun's Gear - "Akun's Gear" Mod Disrupting Torch
sum: Adds a magical club that deals fire damage and has a 10% chance to cast Burning Hands on hit, with a chance to disarm targets who fail a save vs. spell.

new: You cretins must apologize for your rudeness, or we shall be forced to defend the honor of this virtuous young maid with all our might!

co.no: INSTALL ISSUE: COPY_EXISTING ~Tem4003.sto~ fails. Tem4003.sto is a vanilla BG2 Temple store file. This file may not be in override at install time — COPY_EXISTING requires the resource to exist in the chitin.key biff files or in override. Possible cause: Tem4003.sto is not accessible in the EET game data, or it was renamed/relocated. Verify that TEM4003 area store exists in the EET installation before running this mod.
